race.comment: ORLANDO VEYRON (1) turned in a strong performance last start when he battled on bravely to just miss out over 1690m at this track. Has the benefit of a good draw. Facing a tougher assignment but he is up to the task. ZIPPIN PAST (6) failed to emulate her victory at this track two starts ago when second last time out after she led and battled on well at Bendigo over 1650m. Meets a comparable field and she can play a big role. CALLINAN (8) must be considered after he finished third over 1690m at this track three weeks ago after having raced outside the leader at the bell. MY LADY MAC (3) did a good job to finish in the minor placings two runs back then things went sour last time when she broke following interference and finished a long way back in seventh over 1650m at Bendigo. Has the benefit of a good draw this time. Live chance in a similar assignment.
